untranslatable_reason: Sentiment score is not available in the allowed indicators list. This signal requires external sentiment data (e.g., from news/social media sources) which is not part of the standard price-action, technical, or volatility indicators provided. The core logic (buy positive sentiment change, short negative sentiment change) cannot be expressed using only: price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume ratios, or Bar Properties.
translation_notes: Signal is fundamentally based on sentiment analysis requiring external data source. Lookback period, threshold, and half_life parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be inferred from technical indicators alone. Backtest performance (52-156% APR, Sharpe 3.9-5.3) suggests medium-term holding periods but exact exit timing depends on sentiment reversal detection.
